global_rules: Use the most reliable source per attribute. If a primary source is empty, use fallback. Standardize codes and trim whitespace.
defaults: If description missing, use material number. If lifecycle status missing, default to ACTIVE.
examples: Example: material M-1001 with plant 1000 and base UoM EA.

field_rules.rule: Use the canonical material identifier from the core material table.
Prefer the active-language description from MAKT; if missing, use MARA.MAKTX.
Use the material group from the basic material master data.
Use the base unit of measure from the material master; if missing, fallback to MARM.MEINS.
Use the plant code from the plant-level table.
Use the valuation class from accounting data for the material and plant.
Use the gross weight from the material master.
Use the net weight from the material master when available.
Use the lifecycle status from plant data; if absent, default to ACTIVE.
